subject: [PATCH v4 0/2] binfmt_elf: Align eligible read-only PT_LOAD segments to PMD_SIZE for THP

reviews.author: Usama Arif
reviews.summary: Agreed with the approach of piggybacking off exec_folio_order() and mentioned a potential bug in do_sync_mmap_readahead related to mmap_miss counter.

2026-03-13.patch_summary: Aligning eligible read-only PT_LOAD segments to PMD_SIZE for THP is discussed, and the author agrees with piggybacking off exec_folio_order() as done in another patch.
